subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 528508320/170930994 is not a GRB
body:
M. Stanbro (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM
Team:

The following Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger,
tentatively classified as a GRB, was in fact likely due to particle
activity:

528508320 / 170930994 / 23:51:55.83 UT
